summary: Frontend testing completed for commission display fixes and Clear Cache & Reload button. All 7 features verified PASSED. The Daily Projection Total Commission card now correctly shows $917.48 (matching monthly table), commission values display correctly for all rows including missed-status days, Fri Jan 16 correctly aggregates weekend/holiday shifted commissions ($904.48), and Clear Cache & Reload button is present and visible in the user profile dropdown.

issues: DialogContent console warning about missing Description for screen reader accessibility - non-blocking cosmetic issue
Console warning about chart width/height being -1 on initial render - non-blocking cosmetic issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission display fixes verified working: Daily Projection dialog Total Commission card shows $917.48 matching monthly table; Commission column shows actual values for all status days (completed/missed); Weekend/holiday commissions correctly shifted to Fri Jan 16 ($904.48). Clear Cache & Reload button added with data-testid='purge-cache-menu-item' in both expanded and collapsed sidebar profile dropdowns.
